pages.text:
Ministry of Foreign Affairs

Malta

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

WHEREAs the Convention relatine to international Exnditions was signe aris on 22nd November 1928 and supplemented by the Protocol of 30t November 197 and the Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31" May 1988;

AND WHEREAS in accordance with Article 3 of the said Protocol Malta may accede to the Convention and the Protocol as amended,

NOW THEREFORE, I, Joe Borg, Minister of Foreign Affairs of Malta, do hereby declare that the Government of Malta, having considered the above-mentioned

Convention and Protocol, accedes to the same and undertakes faithfully to perform and carry out all the stipulations therein contained.

Accession at Valletta this 15% day of in a ValeS SEE ay Dave sign and sealed to seen of

Two Thousand.

Joe Borg
